text: The patient is prepped and draped in a sterile fashion. The surgeon evaluates perineal weakness digitally before performing bilateral perineal incisions at the ischial tuberosity. Dissection is carried out anteriorly to the transverse perineal muscle using a blunt trochar, and an O-proline suture is passed through. A tailored biological mesh is positioned and fixed to aponeurotic bony structures with two O-PDS sutures.
